examples: It's all full of psychoanalytic mumbo-jumbo.
It's not that the psychoanalytic unconscious is telling the truth.
They said psychoanalytic thinking could make for the betterment of society.
My advice inevitably inclines people towards what I consider to be high-quality psychoanalytic psychotherapy.
For example, Barbara Milrod and colleagues have documented the effectiveness of psychoanalytic psychotherapy for treating Panic Disorder.
